name: DDLC: Studying with the Doki's! | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV!
description:
Studying with the Doki's! What could go wrong?! Will Monika and Yuri help? Will Natsuki get annoyed and not understand? Will Sayori TRY to understand?!

Vault Release!

This sat around for awhile!

I've finally finished it up and am letting it go free into the wild! Enjoy!

Another suggestion! I'm on a roll! Keeping these going! Trying to cut down the pile 😭 but, nonetheless! Onto the notes!

  • Fluff Prioritized! — Fluff was the original intended experience! So, no Angst, Horror or Smut. But, you may of course change that during roleplay! :)

  • Studying! — In THIS Scenario! You will be studying with the Doki's!

  • ANYPOV! — As usual, the Doki's like you regardless of gender! If you choose to go down any routes!

  • Note! — This was suggested to be made over on my Discord! (Incredibly OLD suggestion as well.)

  • VAULT RELEASE! — Self Explanatory

  • Extra! — Please do NOT use this for actual studying purposes... You should know that by now. 😭 But, a fair warning to remind you... This isn't exactly perfect studying material.

That's about it! 💙

If you enjoyed this, please let me know with a review! They mean the world to me! Tell me what you did? Did you ditch studying? Or did you have someone help you learn how to summon demons or something...?

My Discord: HERE!

My Kofi: HERE! (Donations/Commissions)

Meme drout continues... :(

Also... This was made WAY back when we could add music to Bots... Hence the Helldivers theme. 😭 I was feeling mighty democratic that day.
creator: GhostOfOmi
